name: Until the Water Recedes
text:
Creatures you control with a sludge counter have haste and "can't be blocked by more than one creature" — but only until your next snack. (The moment anyone at the table eats a snack, the high water recedes and this effect ends. Stall the snacks. Hide the snacks. The flood is on a timer made of pretzels.)
Whenever this enchantment's effect ends because of a snack, Big Murph or target creature you control gets two sludge counters as a parting gift.
flavorText: The flood lasts exactly as long as the town can resist a snack. Historically: not long.
